# Project Structure

- Canonical coding instructions live in AGENTS.md; also read the nearest scoped AGENTS.md before editing files.

- backend/ - FastAPI app, API routes, AI modules, ML services, database models.
- frontend/ - Vite React SPA with src/pages, src/components, src/lib, Vitest unit tests, and Playwright E2E tests.
- frontend_legacy/ - legacy Streamlit UI kept for reference only.
- scripts/ - DevX utilities (ai_context.py, sync_agent_adapters.py), DB management.
- tests/ - Pytest test suite.
- docs/ - Architecture documentation, whitepapers.
- data/ - Training datasets for ML models.
- airflow/ - Data pipeline DAGs.
- mlops/ - ML operations configs.
- monitoring/ - Observability configs.
